steps.title: Convert years to inputs
steps.content: Use years after $1993$ as the input. Then $1993$ becomes $0$, $2013$ becomes $20$, and $2017$ becomes $24$. The two known data points are $(0{,}64)$ and $(20{,}238)$, with population measured in thousands.

steps.title: Find the linear model
steps.content: Use the two known points to find the slope: $m=\frac{238-64}{20-0}=\frac{174}{20}=8.7$. Since the point with input $0$ has output $64$, the model is $y=8.7x+64$.
